creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
See https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280817#c21 and https://reviews.freebsd.org/D22642

> Enabling DMAR also breaks suspend-to-S3 on my framework 13.  During resume, the
> screen doesn't turn on and I can hear fans spinning.

Split out from PR280817 as that issue is specific to the crash Warner encountered.
